heading: Monday Night
text: Clearing, more clouds after midnight. A few showers in NY late.

heading: Tuesday
text: Windy, warmer.  Partly sunny east of the Green Mountains and south. More clouds north and west. A rising chance of showers.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Showers become more widespread, mainly north of Rt. 4, fizzling late.

heading: Wednesday
text: Morning lull then widespread rain. Cooler.
